$comment: Single source of truth for the CIM demo prediction market. Consumed by /api/info/[alias] (variable metadata) and scripts/seed-market.mjs (on-chain initialization). Per-variable clique fields: cliques lists existing cliques (each an array of member aliases) the new variable is absorbed into; newCluster starts a new clique containing the variable plus the existing variables in members. A cluster anchor uses newCluster with no members; the rest of a thematic cluster is absorbed into the anchor clique via cliques. Variables are listed in the exact order they must be added on-chain.

variables.name: U.S. Inflation (2026)
variables.description: Year-end 2026 U.S. CPI inflation band. Drives the Federal Reserve's policy response and overall recession risk.

variables.name: Fed Policy Direction (2026)
variables.description: Direction of the Federal Reserve's policy rate over 2026. The Fed reacts to inflation, and its decisions in turn shape recession risk.

variables.name: U.S. Recession in 2026
variables.description: Whether the U.S. enters a recession (two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth) during 2026. Jointly determined with inflation and Fed policy.

variables.name: Presidential Approval (End 2026)
variables.description: Presidential job-approval rating at the end of 2026. Shaped by the economic climate and, in turn, drives the midterm and 2028 election outcomes.

variables.name: 2026 U.S. House Control
variables.description: Which party controls the U.S. House of Representatives after the 2026 midterm elections. Strongly tied to presidential approval.

variables.name: 2028 Presidential Winner
variables.description: Party of the winner of the 2028 U.S. presidential election. Influenced by the incumbent's approval and the midterm result.

variables.name: S&P 500 Full-Year 2026
variables.description: Whether the S&P 500 index finishes 2026 up or down on the year. Co-moves with recession sentiment and broad risk appetite.

variables.name: Bitcoin Price (End 2026)
variables.description: Bitcoin spot price band at the end of 2026. Tracks risk appetite alongside equities.

variables.name: 2026 FIFA World Cup Winner
variables.description: Confederation of the winner of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, hosted across North America.

variables.name: Super Bowl LX Winner
variables.description: Conference of the winning team in Super Bowl LX (February 2026).
